basic_details.job_title: TMC IT Technical Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) IT Technical Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website tmc.gov.in.Has been announced through the TMC IT Technical Engineer Recruitment 2026. Candidates who meet the educational requirements—B.E./B.Tech in Computer/Electronics/IT (min 50%) with 1 year relevant experience, Diploma in Computers/Electronics/IT (min 50%) with 2 years relevant experience, or B.Sc in Computer Science/IT with 1-year certificate in hardware/networking and 2 years relevant experience—are eligible to apply for this post. The walk-in interview for TMC IT

qualification.details: Graduate of Engineering in computer/ Electronic/ IT with minimum 50% marks from Govt. recognized board/ University with one-year relevant experience OR Diploma of Engineering in Computers/ Electronics/ IT with minimum 50% marks from Govt. recognized board/ University with two-years relevant experience OR Graduate of science in Computer Science/ IT Stream with 1 year certificate course in computer hardware and networking and minimum two years of relevant work experience.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview MCQ Test (if more candidates) Shortlisting for interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the IT Technical Engineer post at TMC?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the IT Technical Engineer post at Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) is scheduled for 28 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the IT Technical Engineer position?
faq.answer: The salary for the IT Technical Engineer position at TMC ranges from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the IT Technical Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech in Computer/Electronics/IT with 1 year of experience, or a Diploma in Computers/Electronics/IT with 2 years of experience, or a B.Sc in Computer Science/IT with a hardware/networking certificate and 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the IT Technical Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive at Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What type of job is this IT Technical Engineer position?
faq.answer: The IT Technical Engineer position at Tata Memorial Centre is a Contract-based job.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for the IT Technical Engineer post going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the TMC office in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The specific address and reporting time will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the IT Technical Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview. An MCQ Test may be conducted if there are more candidates, followed by shortlisting for the interview.
